properties.notes: The November 3, 2020 election page names Kate Colin as Mayor-elect, and the December 7, 2020 special City Council minutes record her oath of office. This historical service window ends when the current mayoral term begins on December 16, 2024.
The December 16, 2024 special meeting page includes the swear-in ceremony for Kate Colin as Mayor, which provides the first explicit service-start boundary for the current at-large mayoral term.
